creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Johannes M Dieterich from comment #3)

Hello Johannes,

The macro `isinf` is type generic.  It automatically selects the correct function for the operand type, so the float variant of the function is taken here.  See ISO/IEC 9899:1999 or IEEE 1003.1 2001.  A function or macro isinff does not exist on FreeBSD.
